title: chrysanthemum carnosulum
intro: Chrysanthemum carnosulum, also known as the fragrant chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum carnosulum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide relief from fever and headaches. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
